title: Smoky Australian Beef Tagine
description: A rich and flavorful beef tagine with a smoky twist, inspired by Australian barbecue.
instructions: Heat 1 tbsp of olive oil in the tagine over medium-high heat. Add the beef and brown on all sides.
Add the chopped onion and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and cook for 1 minute.
Add the cumin and cinnamon, and stir to combine.
Add the smoky liquid and stir to combine.
Transfer the tagine to the preheated oven and cook for 1 1/2 hours, or until the beef is tender.
Remove the tagine from the oven and let it rest for 10 minutes.
Serve the beef hot, garnished with fresh herbs if desired.
